name: Ice
description: Free open-source macOS menu bar manager — hide, show, and organize menu bar items (Bartender alternative).

seo.title: Ice — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Ice: Free open-source macOS menu bar manager — hide, show, and organize menu bar items (Bartender alternative).

when_to_use: Hiding unused macOS menu bar icons to reduce clutter
Organizing menu bar items by visibility rules on smaller screens
Free Bartender alternative for macOS menu bar management
Keyboard shortcut to toggle menu bar item visibility
Streamlined menu bar layout for a focused coding environment

cons: Small dev team, slower issue response
No paid tier for sustainability yet
Some edge-case bugs with new apps
review.verdict: The OSS answer to Bartenders controversy — free, clean, and good enough for most menu-bar hoarders.
review.best_for: macOS users wanting free menu bar management after distrusting Bartenders ownership change
review.not_for: Power users dependent on Bartenders deepest customization options
